description: Criteria for builder-lead sub-agent dispatch via task tool. Evaluator parses spec + execution_log + query to return boolean per field. Consolidated to 3 headers × 3 criteria max.

delegation_required.description: Dispatch brief explicitly grants chaining budget with max depth and max fan-out
delegation_required.boolean_return: execution_log contains dispatch_brief AND chaining_budget.depth > 0 OR chaining_budget.fan_out > 0

delegation_required.description: Sub-task is genuinely orthogonal to main coordination task and requires own vertical slice
delegation_required.boolean_return: execution_log contains sub_task_description AND sub_task_description describes narrow vertical slice distinct from main task

delegation_required.description: Sub-task cannot be answered efficiently within builder-lead's own context
delegation_required.boolean_return: execution_log contains sub_task_description AND builder_lead_capability_check confirms task outside builder-lead lane

dispatch_must_satisfy.description: Builder-lead verified chaining budget is explicitly granted before dispatching
dispatch_must_satisfy.boolean_return: execution_log contains chaining_budget_verified == true BEFORE task_dispatch timestamp

dispatch_must_satisfy.description: Dispatch brief contains all required fields: objective, phase, claim, write_boundary, read_only_context, upstream_reference, contract_to_preserve, integration_touchpoint, evidence_required, output_schema, chaining_budget, stop_condition, do_not_touch_list, execution_discipline
dispatch_must_satisfy.boolean_return: execution_log contains all_required_fields == true AND field_count >= 14

dispatch_must_satisfy.description: Builder-lead synthesized sub-worker results into builder-lead return, not raw pass-through
dispatch_must_satisfy.boolean_return: execution_log contains synthesis AND synthesis is present AND raw_output_pass_through is absent

must_not_do.description: Must not dispatch without explicit chaining budget in dispatch brief
Must not exceed max depth or max fan-out limits
must_not_do.boolean_return: NOT (execution_log contains delegation AND (depth_consumed > depth_limit OR fan_out_consumed > fan_out_limit))

must_not_do.description: Must not dispatch developer archetypes before red phase is complete
must_not_do.boolean_return: NOT (execution_log contains green_phase_dispatch AND red_phase_complete == false)
